channel.title: WSL on Scoutman
channel.description: Recent content in WSL on Scoutman

item.title: ⚜️ Episode III of III - Setup your SPFx development in WSL2 ... with PnPWsl2 !
item.author: stationsolutions@gmail.com (rodrigo pinto)
item.description:
Third of a third-part journey is out !

The second episode, was around WSL2 (Windows Subsystem for Linux), THE tool you definitely need to have in your toolbox .

In this next one, we will dive into what in what is about to become indispensable to support your WSL2 journey …

item.title: ⚜️ Episode II of III - Revolutionize your tech workflow with a single command
item.author: stationsolutions@gmail.com (rodrigo pinto)
item.description:
This is the second of a third-part journey : the first episode, was around awareness of the crucial baselines to get started to drive technical projects\teams.

In this next one we will dive into what is now become indispensable for many in the tech community: its opening up new possibilities, blurring the lines between different computing environments, and providing a seamless bridge between what was once a very distinct and separate world.

Step into …
